issue: The add(a, b) function returns the wrong result for positive and negative numbers.
The multiply(a, b) function returns the wrong product for positive numbers and zero.
The divide(a, b) function multiplies instead of dividing and should still raise on division by zero.
The slugify function should use hyphens and collapse repeated whitespace.
The parse_csv_line function should parse comma-separated values and trim spaces.
The get_timeout function should return a default timeout of 30 when timeout is missing.
The unique_items function should remove duplicates while preserving first-seen order.
The celsius_to_fahrenheit function should include the Fahrenheit offset.
